Type `help` or press `Tab` to explore.

## Available Commands

- `ls [path]` — list directory contents
- `cd <path>` — change directory
- `cat <file>` — display file contents
- `open <path>` — open Finder window
- `pwd` — print working directory
- `echo <text>` — display text
- `env` — display environment variables
- `history` — display command history
- `clear` — clear terminal
- `help` — display this help message

## Navigation

- `~` — home directory
- `resume/` — CV sections (experience, education, projects, toolkit)

~/resume/experience/tobi-wealth.md.content:
# Tobi Wealth — Principal Software Engineer

**URL:** [tobiwealth.com](https://tobiwealth.com/)

**Role:** Principal Software Engineer | **Location:** Remote | **Duration:** Dec 2025 – Present

Owning product-facing performance and UX quality across a modern fintech stack.

## Highlights

- Built a multi-tier caching layer for dashboards and media that eliminated redundant network request patterns and removed loading skeleton flashes during background data refreshes
- Shipped a financial wellness engagement system with progress visualization and animations for recurring user retention
- Hardened a TypeScript-to-Swift type generation pipeline driven by YAML schemas, eliminating runtime decoding mismatches caused by snake_case leaks and string literal drift between backend contracts and mobile clients
- Orchestrated the migration of complex monoliths into a declarative component system, accelerating feature development cycles by enabling rapid UI prototyping through reusable Swift components
- Rebuilt onboarding flow to close email enumeration vulnerabilities, iOS password autofill legibility failures, hardening the security posture of the authentication surface before public release
- Owned end-to-end revenue surface: simplified the paywall experience, fixed hero overflow and truncation bugs on smaller devices, and enforced uniform trial messaging across all plan cards so the subscription flow is experiment-ready

**Tools:** SwiftUI, TypeScript, YAML, Caching

**Skills:** iOS development, performance optimization, type safety, security hardening

~/resume/projects/fahadfaruqi-com.md.content:
# fahadfaruqi.com

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** Mar 2026 – Present

A macOS desktop environment simulated entirely in the browser. Go WASM backend owns all logic — filesystem, zsh shell, window manager, Finder, Terminal. Svelte renders the view model and forwards events back.

## Highlights

- Built a full in-memory filesystem, zsh tokenizer, and window manager in Go compiled to WASM
- Strict MVVM architecture — Svelte holds zero domain state, every operation routes through Go bindings
- Implemented drag, resize, minimize, maximize, z-order focus, dock, menu bar with mix-blend-mode auto-contrast

**Tools:** Go, WebAssembly, SvelteKit, Svelte 5, TypeScript, CSS Custom Properties

~/resume/projects/deviantart-mcp.md.content:
# deviantart-mcp

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** Jun 2026 – Present

MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for the DeviantArt API. Lets LLMs browse, search, and interact with DeviantArt content. Go core with an npm wrapper for distribution.

## Highlights

- Built self-contained Go MCP server with OAuth2 flows for both public browsing and user actions
- Designed clean separation — DeviantArt API client has zero MCP knowledge, adapter layer shapes operations into tools
- Distributed via npm with platform-specific binary downloads from GitHub Releases, version-synced through git tags

**Tools:** Go, MCP, OAuth2, npm, GitHub Releases, LLM tooling

~/resume/projects/agents-skills.md.content:
# agents-skills

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** May 2026 – Present

Collection of agent skills and MCP server infrastructure. Includes an image generation workflow powered by Modal + ComfyUI, and a skill for discovering and installing MCP servers across platforms.

## Highlights

- Migrated image generation pipeline to MCP-only server using Google MCP SDK with typed structs and Docker
- Built find-mcps skill with platform-agnostic MCP config detection and conditional Docker builds
- Managed deviantart-mcp as a submodule within a broader agent tooling monorepo

**Tools:** JavaScript, MCP, Modal, ComfyUI, Docker, Google MCP SDK

~/resume/projects/interview-highlighter..content:
# interview-highlighter

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** May 2026 – Present

CLI tool that downloads a YouTube video, transcribes it via LM Studio, extracts a highlight segment, and renders both branded and unbranded clips with optional overlay assets.

## Highlights

- Automated YouTube download, transcription, highlight extraction, and ffmpeg rendering in a single Go binary
- Config-driven branding with overlay positioning, intro/outro video support, and aspect-ratio-preserving cropping
- Integrated LM Studio's OpenAI-compatible API for multimodal audio transcription

**Tools:** Go, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, LM Studio, CLI

~/resume/projects/cover-letter-writter.m.content:
# cover-letter-writter

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** May 2026 – Present

Go CLI that reads cover letter text from the clipboard and outputs a styled PDF with contact info — no templates, no Word, no typing.

## Highlights

- Built a zero-friction workflow — copy text, run binary, get PDF in Downloads
- Configurable output directory, filename, and contact info via JSON config

**Tools:** Go, CLI, PDF generation

~/resume/projects/create-yt-summary.md.content:

**Role:** Creator | **Duration:** May 2026 – Present

Python tool that downloads YouTube video transcripts via yt-dlp and generates structured summaries using LM Studio local models.

## Highlights

- Combined yt-dlp transcript extraction with local LLM summarization for offline-friendly video analysis
